title: Junior Investment Banker at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
